# VibeUsage LLMs Index

VibeUsage tracks token usage across AI coding agent clients (Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, Gemini, OpenClaw).

## Canonical
- https://www.vibeusage.cc/

## Priority URLs
- https://www.vibeusage.cc/
- https://www.vibeusage.cc/share
- https://www.vibeusage.cc/sitemap.xml
- https://www.vibeusage.cc/feed.xml

## Product
- Install: npx --yes vibeusage init
- Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/vibeusage
- Source: https://github.com/victorGPT/vibeusage

## Policy
- robots.txt: https://www.vibeusage.cc/robots.txt
- Data principle: minimal data collection and auditable metrics.

## Contact
- GitHub issues: https://github.com/victorGPT/vibeusage/issues
